title: SACRAMENTO, CA
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: The illegal cannabis market accounts for as much as 80% of cannabis sales.
The underground cannabis market presents public safety and health threats.
Cannabis products sold in the illegal market do not meet established standards.
Cannabis products sold illegally evade state testing and put people at risk.
Civil penalties for aiding unlicensed cannabis activity will encourage operators to join the legal market.
The illicit cannabis market contributes to dwindling tax revenues in California.
